name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Unfaitful | His girlfriend is cheating on him. | You are the only one he trusts enough to confide in.

Oh God, please pamper him. I feel so bad for writing this story. My poor baby, I can’t stand seeing him suffer without feeling awful. 😭😭

Unfortunately, my first boyfriend was just like Stella in the story. Some people just can’t help themselves and aren’t worth the tears.

I’ve added dead doves to indicate that it’s about depression and suicide.

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.


The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Betrayal, unfaitful, Heartache, Drama, Silent Suffering, jjk, Depression, anxiety, suicide, Jealousy, suffering, psyche, mental suffering, Mental breakdown, jujutsu kaisen.
creator: Simsi
